evidence: "It's nice to have a show we can watch together in which she gets exposed to an alternative way of life..."
"If you enjoy historical settings, WWII settings and/or English crime stories, give it a go."
"The story usually focuses on 1 random object that Fig (the lead character) decides to find a way to use."
"The characters are fun to get to know and follow."
"The pacing and building of tension kept me on the edge of my seat in many scenes..."
"I found this refreshing. All-in-all this was a funny, adventurous and upbeat film."
"Not Oscar-quality production, but not meant to be (and still good production values for TV)."
"A very well-produced (scenes of the plane in distress, in particular) and acted movie."
"I keep up with animated releases, particularly Disney & Pixar."
"Not as 5 star as 'UP' or 'Toy Story' but still solidly watchable."
"I am mesmerized by the craft of it-I mean, it is just beautiful to watch."
"It is very atmospheric in its depiction of the house and its grounds and New England."
"It's a great conversation starter for my child and I..."
"I found myself thinking about the movie and the general 'feel' it gave me afterwards..."

summary: The user enjoys family-friendly content, particularly animated films and historical narratives. They appreciate visual beauty and emotional depth in storytelling, while showing a preference for simpler narratives and a mix of pacing styles.
